name: Koi Fish

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: The koi lunges out of its patrol line and snaps its jaws shut on the target.
attacks.howToAvoid: Stay close to roots, rocks, or the shoreline so you can break its chase line before it reaches range.
attacks.notes: It instantly kills the player and most small creatures if it connects.

attacks.name: Gulp
attacks.tell: It slows for a moment, opens its mouth even wider, and tries to swallow its prey whole.
attacks.howToAvoid: If it has already spotted you, throw Decoy Bait or leave the water immediately; once the animation starts there is almost no room to react.
attacks.notes: It acts as a slower finisher but is just as lethal as the quick bite.

description: The Koi Fish is the pond's major environmental threat. It is not a killable creature: you avoid it, distract it, or route around it.
behavior: It swims a fairly fixed route between the pagoda and the opposite side of the pond, pushing through large plants and looking for smaller prey that crosses its territory.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes hostile as soon as it detects the player. Once it locks on, it accelerates to devour you and turns any positioning mistake into instant death.
interactionWithCreatures: It mainly eats tadpoles and other small pond creatures. It does not usually hunt large creatures outside its route, but anything caught in front of its jaws vanishes instantly.
strategy: The goal is not to fight, but to avoid it. Decoy Bait is the key tool, and its blind eye lets you cross some areas if you move on that side and avoid floating in the open.
respawnInfo: Always present; it patrols the pond as an environmental hazard and cannot be removed permanently.

loot.notes: Can be obtained by striking the koi's body directly; killing it is not required.

loot.item: Buried pond scales are a separate source.

advancedLootTable.notes: The chance is rolled per successful body hit, not on kill.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Its bites function as instant death for the player.

specialTraits: Its blind eye lets you cross some routes with better positioning.
It only has a gold card, obtained automatically.
